title: Molokai
description: A bundle of QoL and performance enhancements for Create-focused gameplay with out of the box config.
body:
![Molokai Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1acc0688b9bf84a507fd799a75ecb38a2d9f5d38.webp) A bundle of QoL and performance enhancements for Create-focused gameplay with out of the box config.
# Molokai Molokai is bundle of quality of life and performance enhancements for Create-focused gameplay with out of the box config built on [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline). Jump right into Create and related mods instead of spending half your time in a menu! _This modpack was created so that players of a private server can automatically stay in sync with updates to the server, but it remains available to anyone who appreciates QoL enhancements and the Create mod._ ## 📥 Installation The recommended method of downloading, installing, and updating this modpack is to do so through the [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app). - **Before launching for the first time, set your Java memory (Settings gear > Java settings > Java memory) to at least `4096` mb, although `8192` is recommended.** - Shaders are included and selected but disabled by default to assist low end systems. Press `k` in-game to toggle shaders. ## ✨ Out of the Box Configuration The following notable options are applied out of the box in addition to those included with Adrenaline:
Vanilla Options - The Mojang logo appears in dark mode by default. - Accessibility onboarding is disabled by default. - The "Caution: Third-Party Online Play" screen is disabled by default. - Realms notifications are disabled by default. - The social interactions hint is disabled by default. - Tutorial steps are disabled by default. - Advanced item tooltips (showing durability) is enabled by default. - The brightness (gamma) is set to bright by default. - Music volume is set to zero by default. - Weather volume is set to 10% by default. - All other volumes are set to 25% by default (to optimize volume for voice channels). - The Molokai resource pack (which changes the title screen) is enabled by default. - The Sparkles resource pack is enabled by default (to make Terralith, Incendium, and Nullscape biomes and biome names look correct).
Mod Options - Complimentary Shaders are selected within Iris but not enabled by default. (Press `k` to toggle.) - Create Engineer's Goggles tooltips are integrated into Jade by default. - Xaero's Minimap is displayed in the top right corner by default. - Xaero's Minimap displays the current biome name by default. - Mod Menu replaces the Realms menu option by default. - Mod update notifications (and related settings) are disabled by default.
## 📦 What's Included The following mods, shaders, and resource packs are included:
Mods - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Azure Paxels](https://modrinth.com/mod/azure-paxels) - [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders) - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/) - [Create Enchantment Industry Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric) - [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - [Create Fabric Sodium Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric-sodium-fix) - [Create Goggles](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-goggles) - [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack) - [Create Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation) - [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) - [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) - [Custom Biome Saplings](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith-biome-saplings) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps/) - [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) - [Farmer's Delight [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/) - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [Jade Addons (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-fabric) - [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/) - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling/) - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) - [Remove Terralith Intro Message](https://modrinth.com/mod/remove-terralith-intro-message) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak/) - [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) - [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves) - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)
Shaders - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
Resource Packs - [Sparkles: Stardust Labs Resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles)
## ❓ Getting Support If you are a member of the private server, please submit issues, feedback, and suggestions via Discord. Otherwise, this modpack is provided as-is. Please consult the documentation for each individual mod or your server operator. ## 💚 Support Creators If you find value in this pack, please consider supporting the creators of Adrenaline as well as the mods and shaders listed above.
